name: 1, 2, 3... Bruegel!
short_description: A playful VR experience into Pieter Bruegel the Elder’s painting “Children’s Games”.
detailed_description:
1,2,3 Bruegel is an entertaining VR experience in 3D Real-time into the mysterious Pieter Bruegel the Elder’s painting “Children’s Games”: a game of hide and seek where your mission will be to find the 218 children hidden in the city. The painting is no longer a painting but a model game where you can walk around and play.

By Gordon & Andrés Jarach
Original soundtrack: Étienne Charry
Executive producer: Chloé Jarry
Production manager: Alessandra Bogi
3D artist: Timothée Marnat / Novelab
Post-production 360° studio: Maxime Villemard, Cow Prod
Coproducers: Camera lucida productions, Arte France
Distributor: Lucid Realities
With the support of Centre National du Cinéma et de l’Image Animée - Fonds Nouveaux Médias, Fonds Transmédia de la Ville de Paris
